app.title: aXIOM
app.subtitle: Academic Assessment Tool
step.welcome.title: Welcome to aXIOM
step.welcome.lead: aXIOM helps you evaluate whether student work meets your department's specific requirements.
step.welcome.body: The tool carries the analytical paperwork. You read, challenge, and decide.
step.welcome.what.heading: What you'll need to get started
step.welcome.what.item1: An account with an AI provider (Anthropic or OpenAI)
step.welcome.what.item2: An API key from that provider — we'll walk you through it
step.provider.title: Choose your AI provider
step.provider.description: aXIOM uses an AI provider to analyse student work. Choose the provider you have an account with — or create an account now.
step.provider.anthropic.label: Anthropic Claude
step.provider.anthropic.description: Best choice if you're starting fresh. Recommended for Polish-language student work.
step.provider.openai.label: OpenAI GPT
step.provider.openai.description: Good choice if you already have an OpenAI account.
step.apikey.title.anthropic: Set up your Anthropic API key
step.apikey.title.openai: Set up your OpenAI API key
step.apikey.instructions.heading: How to get your API key
step.apikey.instructions.anthropic.step1: Open console.anthropic.com in a new tab
step.apikey.instructions.anthropic.step2: Sign in or create a free account
step.apikey.instructions.anthropic.step3: Go to API Keys in the left menu
step.apikey.instructions.anthropic.step4: Click Create Key, name it (e.g. “aXIOM”), then copy it
step.apikey.instructions.openai.step1: Open platform.openai.com in a new tab
step.apikey.instructions.openai.step2: Sign in or create a free account
step.apikey.instructions.openai.step3: Go to API keys in the left menu
step.apikey.instructions.openai.step4: Click Create new secret key, name it (e.g. “aXIOM”), then copy it
step.apikey.field.label: API Key
step.apikey.model.label: Model
step.apikey.security.note: Your key is stored only on this device in browser storage. It is never sent anywhere except {provider}'s API.
step.apikey.cost.note: Cost estimate: a single assessment typically costs €0.01–€0.05 depending on the length of student work and the model you choose.
step.apikey.test.error.empty: Please paste your API key first.
step.apikey.test.error.format.anthropic: This doesn't look like an Anthropic key. Anthropic keys start with sk-ant-. Copy the key exactly as shown in the Anthropic console.
step.apikey.test.error.format.openai: This doesn't look like an OpenAI key. OpenAI keys start with sk-. Copy the key exactly as shown in the OpenAI platform.
step.apikey.test.error.auth: The key was rejected by {provider}. Double-check you copied the full key — they are long. If the key is new, wait 30 seconds and try again.
step.apikey.test.error.rate: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
step.apikey.test.error.network: Could not reach {provider}'s servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
step.apikey.test.error.unknown: Something went wrong. Check your key is correct and try again.
step.apikey.test.hint: Run a quick check to confirm your key works before continuing.
step.probe.title: Checking your setup
step.probe.description: Running a quick check to confirm your AI provider can handle aXIOM's assessment tasks. This takes a few seconds.
step.probe.warn.structured: This model returned a valid response but did not follow the structured output format precisely. Assessment results may occasionally require review.
step.probe.warn.polish: This model's Polish-language handling is limited. Assessment of Polish student work may produce lower-quality output. You can still proceed.
step.probe.fail.message: This provider configuration could not complete the capability check. This means aXIOM cannot run assessments reliably with this setup. Please check your key or try a different model.
step.ready.title: You're ready to go
step.ready.description: aXIOM is configured and ready to run assessments. You can change your AI provider settings at any time from within the application.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
